title: The Swartberg veld fire remains uncontrolled
description: OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The Swartberg veld fire,...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The Swartberg veld fire, which started on 11 January, remains uncontrolled.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The Swartberg veld fire, which started on 11 January, remains uncontrolled."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"On the northern side of Middelwater (north-western and north-eastern sections), the fire has crossed the mountain crest and is now burning into the Central Karoo area. The western and eastern flanks are burning from the south-west and south-east, respectively, with isolated pockets also burning over the crest."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On the northern plateau, a game farm lies in the projected path of the fire.","html":"On the northern plateau, a game farm lies in the projected path of the fire."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Planned actions for today include a ground crew working along the south-eastern fire line, west of Meijersrust. A team has been positioned on the northern side of the mountain to track the fire’s progress down the slope.","html":"Planned actions for today include a ground crew working along the south-eastern fire line, west of Meijersrust. A team has been positioned on the northern side of the mountain to track the fire’s progress down the slope."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A southerly wind is forecast from 15:00, with expected gusts of up to 30 km/h until 19:00. For this reason, a ground crew will be redeployed to the game farm.","html":"A southerly wind is forecast from 15:00, with expected gusts of up to 30 km/h until 19:00. For this reason, a ground crew will be redeployed to the game farm."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Stakeholders involved in the response include the Garden Route District Municipality (GRDM), CapeNature, the Oudtshoorn Municipality, Working on Fire, and the Central Karoo District Municipality.","html":"Stakeholders involved in the response include the Garden Route District Municipality (GRDM), CapeNature, the Oudtshoorn Municipality, Working on Fire, and the Central Karoo District Municipality."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Members of the public who spot a veld fire are urged to report it immediately to the GRDM Emergency Call Centre on 044 805 5071 or via WhatsApp on 081 709 5193.","html":"Members of the public who spot a veld fire are urged to report it immediately to the GRDM Emergency Call Centre on 044 805 5071 or via WhatsApp on 081 709 5193."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: The Swartberg veld fire remains uncontrolled
